title: THE ENAGETI INCIDENT
incidentReport: Ginger was found beneath the Walnut Tree shortly after sunrise. The murder weapon was left at the scene. Marki, Bego, and Baxi were the only animals seen outside that morning.

interviews.speaker: Marki
interviews.statement: I never went anywhere near the Barn.

interviews.speaker: Bego
interviews.statement: The Shovel was lying beside the Orchard.

interviews.speaker: Baxi
interviews.statement: Everyone blames the old dog first. Believe what you want—I never carried the Stick.

clues: Bego was seen near the Walnut Tree.
The Stick was not taken to the Barn.
Baxi was not in the Orchard.
